name: Baked Macaroni & Cheese
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Bag of elbow macaroni - cooked
8 oz each medium cheddar, monterey jack, and colby - grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 9x13-inch pan with Pam.
2. Spread half of the cooked macaroni in the pan.
3. Sprinkle half of each cheese on top, using more monterey jack in the middle.
4. Dot with butter.
5. Pour half of the beaten eggs on top.
6. Pour evaporated milk over the mixture (about 1/4 to 1/2 can).
7. Repeat steps 3-6 with remaining ingredients.
8. Bake at 350°F to 375°F until cooked throughout and the top is brownish.
Very rich, but delish. Freezes well.
